name: Amino Acids
description: Essential and non-essential amino acids for food fortification, sports nutrition, and pharmaceutical applications. We source pharmaceutical-grade amino acids from certified global manufacturers.

items.name: L-Glutamine
items.desc: Supports muscle recovery and gut health in sports nutrition formulations.

items.name: L-Lysine HCl
items.desc: Essential amino acid used in food fortification and animal feed supplements.

items.name: L-Tryptophan
items.desc: Precursor to serotonin, used in nutraceutical and pharmaceutical products.

items.name: Taurine
items.desc: Key ingredient in energy drinks, infant formula, and cardiac supplements.

items.name: L-Carnitine
items.desc: Supports fat metabolism; widely used in weight management and sports nutrition.

name: Sweeteners & Sugar Substitutes
description: A comprehensive range of natural and artificial sweeteners including sugar alcohols, high-intensity sweeteners, and blends for the food and beverage industry.

items.name: Sucralose
items.desc: Zero-calorie high-intensity sweetener, 600x sweeter than sugar.

items.name: Stevia Extract (Reb-A)
items.desc: Natural plant-based sweetener for clean-label products.

items.name: Aspartame
items.desc: Low-calorie sweetener for beverages, confectionery, and dairy products.

items.name: Xylitol
items.desc: Sugar alcohol with dental benefits, used in chewing gums and oral care.

items.name: Erythritol
items.desc: Zero-calorie sugar alcohol for keto-friendly and diabetic-safe products.

name: Vitamins & Minerals
description: Complete portfolio of vitamins (A, B-complex, C, D, E, K) and essential minerals for nutraceutical, food fortification, and pharmaceutical applications.

items.name: Vitamin C (Ascorbic Acid)
items.desc: Antioxidant vitamin for immune support and food preservation.

items.name: Vitamin D3 (Cholecalciferol)
items.desc: Fat-soluble vitamin for bone health and immune function.

items.name: Zinc Sulphate
items.desc: Essential mineral for immune support and wound healing.

items.name: Ferrous Fumarate
items.desc: Iron supplement for anemia prevention and food fortification.

items.name: Vitamin B12 (Cyanocobalamin)
items.desc: Essential for red blood cell formation and neurological function.

name: Food & Beverage Ingredients
description: Functional food ingredients including emulsifiers, stabilisers, preservatives, acidulants, and flavour enhancers for the modern food and beverage industry.

items.name: Citric Acid (Anhydrous/Monohydrate)
items.desc: Versatile acidulant for beverages, confectionery, and preservation.

items.name: Sodium Benzoate
items.desc: Food-grade preservative for acidic foods and beverages.

items.name: Xanthan Gum
items.desc: Thickener and stabiliser for sauces, dressings, and dairy products.

items.name: Malic Acid
items.desc: Flavour enhancer providing tart taste in beverages and candies.

items.name: Potassium Sorbate
items.desc: Widely used preservative for baked goods, wines, and dairy.

name: Excipients & Binders
description: Pharmaceutical and nutraceutical grade excipients including binders, fillers, disintegrants, and coating agents for tablet and capsule manufacturing.

items.name: Microcrystalline Cellulose (MCC)
items.desc: Leading binder and filler for direct compression tablets.

items.name: Croscarmellose Sodium
items.desc: Super-disintegrant for rapid tablet dissolution.

items.name: Povidone (PVP K-30)
items.desc: Versatile binder for wet granulation and coating applications.

items.name: Magnesium Stearate
items.desc: Lubricant for tablet and capsule manufacturing.

items.name: HPMC (Hypromellose)
items.desc: Coating agent and controlled-release matrix former.

name: Nutraceutical Raw Materials
description: Premium raw materials for dietary supplements, functional foods, and wellness products including herbal extracts, probiotics support, and specialty nutrients.

items.name: Coenzyme Q10 (CoQ10)
items.desc: Powerful antioxidant for heart health and cellular energy production.

items.name: Omega-3 Fish Oil Powder
items.desc: Microencapsulated EPA/DHA for heart and brain health supplements.

items.name: Glucosamine Sulphate
items.desc: Joint health ingredient for sports and senior nutrition.

items.name: Curcumin Extract (95%)
items.desc: Anti-inflammatory turmeric extract for wellness supplements.

items.name: Collagen Peptides
items.desc: Hydrolyzed collagen for skin, hair, nail, and joint health.

name: Organic Solvents & Thinners
description: High-purity organic solvents and thinners for pharmaceutical synthesis, coatings, adhesives, and industrial cleaning applications.

items.name: Isopropyl Alcohol (IPA)
items.desc: Versatile solvent for pharmaceutical, cosmetic, and industrial use.

items.name: Ethyl Acetate
items.desc: Low-toxicity solvent for coatings, adhesives, and extraction.

items.name: Methanol
items.desc: Industrial solvent for chemical synthesis and fuel applications.

items.name: Acetone
items.desc: Fast-evaporating solvent for cleaning, coatings, and lab use.

items.name: Dichloromethane (DCM)
items.desc: Powerful solvent for pharmaceutical extraction and paint removal.

name: Feed & Poultry Additives
description: Nutritional additives, growth promoters, and health supplements for poultry, cattle, aquaculture, and pet food industries.

items.name: DL-Methionine
items.desc: Essential amino acid for poultry growth and egg production.

items.name: Choline Chloride 60%
items.desc: Vital nutrient for liver function and fat metabolism in livestock.

items.name: Lysine Sulphate
items.desc: Cost-effective lysine source for swine and poultry feed.

items.name: Betaine Anhydrous
items.desc: Osmoprotectant that improves feed conversion and meat quality.

items.name: Calcium Propionate
items.desc: Feed-grade preservative preventing mould growth in animal feed.

name: Natural Polymers & Modified Derivatives
description: Natural and modified polymers including cellulose derivatives, starches, and gums for pharmaceutical, food, cosmetic, and industrial applications.

items.name: Sodium CMC (Carboxymethyl Cellulose)
items.desc: Thickener and stabiliser for food, pharma, and personal care.

items.name: Hydroxypropyl Starch
items.desc: Modified starch for improved texture in food products.

items.name: Guar Gum
items.desc: Natural thickener for food, textile, and oil drilling industries.

items.name: Sodium Alginate
items.desc: Seaweed-derived polymer for food encapsulation and wound care.

items.name: Ethyl Cellulose
items.desc: Film-forming polymer for controlled-release pharma coatings.

name: Dairy & Protein Concentrates
description: High-quality dairy proteins, whey concentrates, casein, and plant-based protein sources for sports nutrition, bakery, and food manufacturing.

items.name: Whey Protein Concentrate (WPC 80)
items.desc: High-quality protein source for sports nutrition and functional foods.

items.name: Skimmed Milk Powder (SMP)
items.desc: Versatile dairy ingredient for bakery, confectionery, and beverages.

items.name: Sodium Caseinate
items.desc: Milk protein for coffee whiteners, meat processing, and nutrition bars.

items.name: Soy Protein Isolate (SPI 90)
items.desc: Plant-based protein for vegetarian and vegan food applications.

items.name: Lactose (Pharma Grade)
items.desc: Pharmaceutical-grade filler and carrier for tablet manufacturing.
